inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $704.8M minus immaterial capital spending, divided by ~78M diluted shares (pre-full Sandstorm weighting); Q1 2026 run-rate ~$8.3/sh on ~85M shares
inputs.shares_source: Q1 2026 net income $281.1M / diluted EPS $3.30 (10-Q filed 2026-05-07)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 revenue +43% YoY includes Sandstorm Gold combination and elevated metal prices; Lawrence uses run-rate owner cash near $9/sh, not peak spot-year heroics.

bear.notes: Gold price mean-reversion, slower development contributions

base.notes: Combined portfolio growth near inflation plus modest development ramp; exit ~22x cash flow

bull.notes: Sustained gold/silver prices plus Sandstorm synergy and new stream deliveries

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Sandstorm acquisition added ~$4.1B purchase accounting and $1.19B deferred tax liability; economic value is royalty cash flows, not goodwill line

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / development royalties?
option_scan.evidence: Portfolio includes development-stage streams; growth years 1-5 cite filing pipeline [Assumption] for conversion timing

option_scan.question: Equity method / listed stakes?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investments $300.9M at 12/31/2025 (10-K); fair value marks in other income

growth_explanation.mechanism: Revenue scales with attributable production on existing royalties/streams plus new deliveries from development assets; Sandstorm combination enlarged metal exposure.
growth_explanation.source: FY2025 revenue $1,030M vs $719M prior year (10-K XBRL); operating margin ~62%

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
